description:
Create a ground-mounted solar array in SketchUp Make 2017 using the Skelion plugin.

Instructions:
1. Draw a rectangular flat surface on the ground plane (approximately 20m × 12m).
2. Set the model's geographic location to Austin, Texas.
3. Open Skelion and populate the surface with solar panels facing South (Azimuth 180) and tilted at 25 degrees.
4. Save the model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\ground_mount_array.skp'.
